scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @kinqs/brainrouter-types && npm run build -w @kinqs/brainrouter-sdk && npm run build -w @kinqs/brainrouter-hooks
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @kinqs/brainrouter-mcp-server && npm run build -w @kinqs/brainrouter-cli && npm run build -w dashboard
